# Poseidon Diving Charters

> Premium private diving and boat charters operating from Marina de Lagos, Algarve, Portugal. Maximum 4 guests per charter, expert dive guides, premium meals and refreshments included.

Contact: info@poseidondivingcharters.com · +351 924 955 333 · Marina de Lagos (Gate E–I), Lagos, Portugal

## Home
- [Poseidon Diving Charters — Premium Private Diving & Boat Experiences](https://poseidondivingcharters.com/): Exclusive private diving and boat charters in Lagos, Algarve.

## Experiences
- [Private Boat Charter- Poseidon Diving Charters](https://poseidondivingcharters.com/exclusive-charter): Private boat charter in Lagos, Portugal. Exclusive experiences with Premium Meals & Refreshments included, flexible activities, and itineraries. The boat, crew, and adventure are entirely yours.
- [Experiences - Poseidon Diving Charters](https://poseidondivingcharters.com/experiences): Explore all Poseidon experiences in one place.
- [Pre-Designed Diving Charter- Poseidon Diving Charters](https://poseidondivingcharters.com/pre-designed): All-inclusive diving charter packages in Lagos, Portugal. Easy to book with maximum adventure and minimum fuss. Two dives, expert guides, Premium Meals & Refreshments included.
- [Tailor-Made Diving Experience- Poseidon Diving Charters](https://poseidondivingcharters.com/tailor-made): Create your bespoke diving experience with personalized consultation, Premium Meals & Refreshments included, and premium add-ons. High-end diving charters in Lagos, Portugal.

## Information
- [About Us - Poseidon Diving Charters](https://poseidondivingcharters.com/about): Learn about Poseidon Diving Charters, Lagos' premier provider of tailor-made diving experiences and private boat charters. Our story, values, and commitment to excellence.
- [Contact | Poseidon Diving Charters](https://poseidondivingcharters.com/contact): Premium private diving and boat charters in Lagos, Algarve.
- [FAQ - Poseidon Diving Charters](https://poseidondivingcharters.com/faq): Frequently asked questions about booking, facilities, safety, and dive conditions with Poseidon Diving Charters.
- [Sustainability | Poseidon Diving Charters](https://poseidondivingcharters.com/sustainability): At Poseidon Diving Charters, our mission goes beyond providing dive experiences; it's about preserving the delicate marine ecosystems of the Algarve.

## Blog
- [Blog | Poseidon Diving Charters](https://poseidondivingcharters.com/blog): Discover diving tips, marine life insights, and news from Poseidon Diving Charters in Cape Verde.

## Legal
- [Cookie Policy - Poseidon Diving Charters](https://poseidondivingcharters.com/cookies): Comprehensive guide to how Poseidon Diving Charters uses cookies, data collection, and your privacy rights.

- [Refund Policy - Poseidon Diving Charters](https://poseidondivingcharters.com/refund-policy): Refund and Cancellation Policy for Poseidon Diving Charters. Understand our cancellation terms, refund eligibility, and weather-related policies.
- [Terms of Service - Poseidon Diving Charters](https://poseidondivingcharters.com/terms): Terms of Service for Poseidon Diving Charters. Read our user responsibilities, liability limitations, and service agreements.
